patch.value: Implements unresolved external report #2 delta beyond existing extension/schema parity: tracker dataset parity mode plus explicit mismatch guardrails.
Linked-test PM context parity controls and mismatch guardrails
Add additive PM-command context parity modes, per-run context metadata, and strict mismatch failure controls for pm test and pm test-all.
pm test and pm test-all support additive PM context parity controls; PM-command run results include execution context metadata; strict mismatch guard can fail linked commands deterministically.
Issue triage open; implementation can proceed in same workstream.
Implement with additive defaults to avoid regressions.
Linked PM command observes different item counts than direct workspace command.
Context parity options and metadata make PM-command linked-test behavior explicit and enforceable.
Current behavior can hide dataset mismatch under successful exit code.
Reduces false-green linked verification for governance-critical PM commands.
